description.ko: 우주의 거대한 심연 속에서 보초병처럼 존재하는 VOID-3를 탐험하며, 현실과 영원한 진공 사이의 경계를 모호하게 만드는 고요하고 무한한 공간을 묘사합니다.
description.en: An exploration of the silent, infinite depths of space where VOID-3 exists as a sentinel of the cosmic deep, blurring the lines between reality and the eternal vacuum.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of VOID-3, a colossal celestial structure floating in the deepest part of the cosmos, surrounded by nebulous clouds of indigo and charcoal, faint bioluminescent particles drifting in the zero-gravity vacuum, light from a distant dying star refracting through crystalline structures, hyper-realistic, 8k, volumetric lighting, surreal atmosphere.
